title: Eddy (Jake) — Paladin
bodyText:
Fisherman from **[[shipton]]** — except he isn't. White-eyed **Aasimar** paladin (Oath made S07), now confirmed to be **in the wrong body**: [[ms-judy]]'s solo ritual (S16) showed his Shipton family is an old tale, *famously dead* — and they were never Aasimar. [[kennarea|Kena]] added that he may be **far older than he appears** (S15). Carries **[[velmir|Velmir]]**, [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]' formerly-cursed shadow sword (curse lifted by [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]]).

# What the table knows
- Patchwork memory: real Shipton childhood (sister, carving with mother, knots with father **Kol**) braided with impossible memories — red comet, unfinished symbol, the sun drowning, chained underwater, wanting to die and not being allowed.
- Recurring dreams: Shipton burning, thick water, the red-haired cloaked healer dying for him, the white-haired girl walking away.
- S24 prep: his reflection will be a golden-eyed stranger mouthing **"Remember."**

> [!dm] **The Character Trinity ([[the-pool]]) — locked (grill 2026-07-09):** three beings pulled into [[the-pool|the Pool]], fused into one walking man.
> - **Body = [[lathander]]'s avatar** — sent out of the pool with Leliana's help; unlockable divine power. Freeing the god is the Chapter-1 climax ([[lathander]], [[arc-chapter-1]]).
> - **Mind = the Shipton fisherman** Jake plays — plausibly **Edrelon**, Kol's son ("The Priest's Descent": the boy who fled the drowning town). The surface memory-set.
> - **Soul = Silus**, an **Eladrin of the Feywild** (was parked as Jake's planned character with partner **Gwen** — now canon as Eddy's true soul; see [[ideas-parking-lot]]).
> The caged voice wants "him" **brought back** — these three untangled.

# The Eddy-or-Silus choice (grill 2026-07-09 — mechanics locked, timing moved)
**How it works:** Lathander must **reclaim the avatar body** to return. Jake then keeps ONE of the remaining layers — **the mind (Eddy) or the soul (Silus)** — and the other is left behind, effectively killed. **This can only happen at LATHANDER'S pool** (true escape = all three layers reunited at the god's own node — [[the-pool]]), which the party must find in **Chapter 2** ([[lathander]]). At the Ch-1 cult pool Eddy gets **revelation, not resolution**: communion, the trinity laid bare, proof of what his body is.

Currently being *teased*: Eddy is starting to see "Silus stuff." The seed: his **Familiar**, a weird **mimicking bird from the Feywild** that wandered the depths **searching for Silus** ([[the-familiar]]) — it found him, inside Eddy (S25).
